title: Luffy Keeps Climbing
description: On pages 13–16, luffy keeps climbing as wapol learns that the Straw Hats are heading for Drum Castle, while Dalton and the villagers face the threat of the old tyrant’s return.
scene: Luffy Keeps Climbing. Wapol learns that the Straw Hats are heading for Drum Castle, while Dalton and the villagers face the threat of the old tyrant’s return. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: This is the power of wild beasts,

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You people have no place here...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: A kingdom that would choose to abandon its people at the first sign of trouble is better off destroyed...!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Hmph... Look at him spout such arrogant words...!

dialogue.speaker: Dalton
dialogue.text: The two of us and you used to form the "Three heads of staff." You should know that you stand no chance against both of us.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Not only that, I've known you for far too long... that is your misfortune.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: I know all about your weaknesses...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dalton! We've come to help you fight!

dialogue.speaker: Drum villager
dialogue.text: that soft heart of yours is your weakness, dalton...

summary: This part centers on luffy keeps climbing, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
